title: Spatty Lip Gloss Tiny Beauty Spatula (6 Inch Pink) Shark Tank Mom Made Scrape Last Drop of Lipstick, Mini Spatula Makeup, Long Makeup Spatula, Scoop for Makeup, Makeup Stocking Stuffer, Makeup Spatula
description:
MONEY SAVING LIP GLOSS MAKEUP SPATULAS – The Spatty Lip Pink 6 Inch is a mini cosmetic beauty spatula that can scrape up to 25% more personal care product out of your jar or bottle
SHARK TANK AUTHENTIC – Trust the original miniature multipurpose tiny tool to get every last drop from your expensive lipstick, lip gloss, chapstick and foundation, lotion and other cosmetics products
MOM DESIGNED – Reusable, flexible, dishwasher safe material is fully compliant to apply product directly to your lips or skin; extra skinny scraper fits to scoop most every beauty product on the market
PAYS FOR ITSELF – Budget and zero waste earth friendly long lasting, the long and thin handle applicator with plastic rubber material and curved micro head mean no more wasted mascara or face serum
THE GIFT OF SAVINGS – Perfect holiday stocking stuffer gifts for women - palette mixing, get out the last bit of chap stick, hand cream, facial cream, moisturizer, silicone or liquid latex SFX make-up
reviews_5s:
This tool is great to get that last bit of lotion or cream out of a container. No more wasted product!!!This works great to get the last bit of makeup out of every container!This will save you money by getting that extra little left in the bottle out to be used. It’s simple and easy. Hurry and get this and make the world beautiful.I have been looking to get this product for YEARS. Every time I get to the last drops of my make up or lotion and cut open the package and inevitably slice my finger or can't get the last bit I fall down to my knees and shout "SPATTY DADDY HELP ME!!"

Whelp, I finally just bought it. No, I got a 3 pack. The handles are longer than I thought, the little spatula is expertly shaped and the whole thing is easily cleaned. Yesterday I thought I was out of my primer so I snipped off the bottom and....USED THE SPATTY WITHOUT CUTTING MY FINGER! Girl, I had at least 2 weeks more of primer in that container. It has already paid for itself! So I dropped to my knees and shouted "SPATTY DADDY HAS BESTOWED HIS BENEVOLENCE UPON ME!!!" My husband questions my sanity, but I know all is well.This is perfect for getting foundation, lotion & other liquids out of the bottom of the bottle. I thought I had gotten all the foundation out of a bottle that I could, before ordering this, but once I got it, couldn’t believe how much more it got out!!! It doesn’t absorb the liquid!Nice to get every drop!This tiny spatula is perfect for my lotion bottles with pumps where I can't get all the product out just from the pumps. I hate throwing away the bottles with products left in the bottom and this tiny spatula saves my struggles. So small to stash away too. Definitely recommand.This really helps to get the last bit of makeup out of a bottle! I use it to get the final amounts of my liquid foundation.Perfect little tool to get the last drop out of small jars.This really works for getting out makeup foundation from the bottom of the bottom of bottle.
reviews_1s:
The spatula broke off in the container that it was supposed to help get product out of. So now I have unused product in the bottom of the container and the spatula tip also there. Neither of which are help to me at this point.Advertised as made for getting product out of a lip glass tube. Generally this won’t be true. I actually bought it to get the last bits of product out of my L’Oreal Unbelievabrow tube, which has an opening that’s larger than most standard lip gloss tubes. I managed to shove the little spatula into my L’Oreal Unbelievabrow tube but then couldn’t back it back out, and in my effort to remove it the little spatula head broke off inside the tube, so I ended throwing out both my new spatty and my tube of eyebrow gel. Roughly 6 bucks wasted based on my belief in their description about it’s use for lip gloss was accurate. Has that been true it would’ve easily fit into my eyebrow gel tube with its larger opening. In my opinion this feels like false advertising.Didn’t fit on revlon colorstay I use at all. Was worthless for me.Ad said it fit into lip gloss containers, it does NOT. 😢To be marketed through Shark Tank, I would've expected quality control to be a bit better. I opened the package, super pumped to get the last bit of Lipgloss out of the tube & it literally broke right off inside the tube. I'm not some crazy hulk-like person, so this is simply a design flaw. If it was all one piece, there's nothing to pop off, so...my next attempt at this will be something that is made differently. It wasn't expensive but ummm..now I have a piece of plastic stuck inside the Lipgloss which is annoying also. Just don't get it. I'm considering getting a pack of super long qtips and calling it a day.I used the smallest one for my concealer. I was able to get the wand in, but when I went to take it out the tip popped off. It is now stuck inside my concealer and I’m unable to retrieve it.Tried putting it into my lipgloss & the little spatula head came off when trying to pull it out. As I'm writing this review, I see on the back of the package to remove plastic insert in lipgloss container-impossible. Have always wanted a product such as this but it failed. Probably need a softer or smaller spatula head.The package and ad showed it inside a lipstick tube, but in reality it is not small enough to go in my Covergirl lipstick tube! And I sent it back and Amazon said I requested a replacement!!! NO NO NO... Why would I want another one? I never got a refund even after returning it. They sent ANOTHER one! UGH!! So disappointed with the product and Amazon for not refunding my money!Update: I have used this product 3 times and it is already broken. I am extremely disappointed and unhappy with this purchase.

As another reviewer said, is not very easy to maneuver within glass bottles. it goes in fine to my glass foundation bottle, but then getting the spatula out is extremely difficult, and the foundation usually splatters. Also, it can reach maybe the bottom 50-60% of the bottle, but is unable to reach the top part near the opening where most of the leftover product is concentrated. I was really excited about this product, but am unimpressed and disappointed.This was my second attempt at finding a beauty spatula for my favorite Bobbi Brown lip gloss, whose packaging wastes a ton of product. This was supposed to be specifically for lip gloss tubes. Nope, still too big. I managed to squeeze it into the tube but it was then impossible to get out. See the video. To return it, I’ll have to mail back not only the spatula but my lip gloss tube that it’s stuck in.
